basic_details.post_name: Professor / Professor-cum-Principal/Director, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor
basic_details.short_information: The Utkal University Recruitment 2026 for posts of 141 Faculty. Candidates with Any Masters Degree, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 19-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Utkal University website, utkaluniversity.ac.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: Pay Level-14 (as per 7th CPC) | Associate Professor: Pay Level-13A (as per 7th CPC) | Assistant Professor: As per UGC norms

selection_process: Screening / Scrutiny as per UGC Notification 18th July 2018 + Interview (with PPT presentation)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online through the HIMS Portal (https://hims.odisha.gov.in) which will be available from 19.05.2026. Candidates must complete the application in all respects and upload all supporting documents on or before 20.06.2026. Candidates applying for more than one post must apply online separately for each post, paying application fee for each application. The online application can be filled in multiple sessions. No other format of application or CV will be accepted by email or any other means.
seo_tags: Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 141 Assistant Professor, Associate Professor & Professor Posts
